briefdescription.para: Control Register offset.
Start of MI MUX Register offset.
End of MI MUX Register offset.
Register Update mask.

description.para: It is applicable for MI[0...15] registers.

briefdescription.para: MI MUX mask.
MI Disable mask.
MI Disable shift.
Input Operations.
Output Operations.
This macro reads a value from a AXI4-Stream Switch register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XAxis_Switch core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value of the register.
C-style signature: u32 XAxisScr_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a AXI4-Stream Switch register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XAxis_Switch core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XAxisScr_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the AXI4-Stream Switch core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the AXI4-Stream Switch core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the MUX port specified by a MI index and links with desired SI, indicated by a SiIndex.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for enabling MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].
specifies an index that will be used as a source to MUX. The range is [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: None.
MUX[MiIndex] is sourced from SI[SiIndex]. Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the MUX port specified by a MI index and un-link SI, set previously.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for disabling MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: None.
MUX[MiIndex] is removed for SI[SiIndex]. Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the status of whether MUX is sourced from desired SI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for addressing the MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].
specifies an index that will be used to identify, whether it is sourced. The range is [0 to 15].

listitem.para: TRUE, if MUX is sourced from SI.
FALSE, if MUX is not sourced from SI.

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the status of whether MUX is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for addressing the MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function disables all the MUX port, in turn removes association with desired SI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.

simplesect.para: None.
Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XAxis_Switch_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xaxis_switch.h for the definition of XAxis_Switch_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function performs self test on AXI4-Stream Switch core registers.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This macro enables register updates.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XAxisScr_RegUpdateEnable(XAxis_Switch *InstancePtr)

briefdescription.para: This macro disables register updates.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.

simplesect.para: None.
C-style signature: void XAxisScr_RegUpdateDisable(XAxis_Switch *InstancePtr)

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This is the main file for Xilinx AXI4-Stream Switch Control Router core.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization method for Xilinx AXI4-Stream Source Control Router core.
This file contains self test function for the AXI4-Stream Source Control Router core.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx AXI4-Stream Switch Control Router core.
This file gets generated automatically by HSI.
Please see xaxis_switch.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 01/28/15 Initial release. 1.1 sk 08/16/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for Baseaddress as part of adding 64 bit support. CR# 867425. Changed the prototype of XAxisScr_CfgInitialize API. 1.5 asa 08/25/22 Remove the incorrect check in the API XAxisScr_IsMiPortEnabled. Because of the incorrect check the API can return a false TRUE for an failure case. As an example, if a MI is configured for SI[7] and the API is called to check if the MI is configured for SI[3], the API will return TRUE.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/15/15 Added XPAR_XAXIS_SWITCH_NUM_INSTANCES macro to control config table parameters. Modified copyright header. Added doxygen tag and modification history.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xaxis_switch.h file.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 01/28/15 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 01/28/15 Initial release.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 01/28/15 Initial release. 1.00 sha 07/15/15 Defined macro XPAR_XAXIS_SWITCH_NUM_INSTANCES if not defined in xparameters.h 1.2 ms 02/20/17 Fixed compilation warning. This is a fix for CR-969126. 1.8 vlt 12/12/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
